name: South Carolina DES Asbestos Contractors and Consultants Search

agency.name: South Carolina Department of Environmental Services

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official search and licensing program before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: South Carolina asbestos abatement contractor licenses
Asbestos personnel and consultant categories exposed by the official search
knownExclusions: The source includes multiple asbestos personnel and consultant categories; contractor verification must select the contractor category explicitly.
The published list is informational and does not imply DES endorsement.
Local permits and non-asbestos contractor credentials are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. The official interface exposes an Export Data action, but its format, completeness, stability, and reuse conditions require review before automated ingestion.
publicRecordsNotes: DES licenses asbestos contractors and individuals and publishes an official category-based search. Absence from one result category is not proof that no credential exists.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The lookup exposes an Export Data action, but no stable documented bulk contract or redistribution permission has been confirmed.
researchNotes: DES is the asbestos licensing authority and publishes contractor and consultant search categories. This source remains a manual handoff until the export shape, completeness, privacy fields, and terms are reviewed for an adapter.
maintainerNotes: Do not publish contact fields or exported records without source-specific privacy and redistribution review. Keep the category and checked time with every result.

researchEvidence.note: Official program page states that DES licenses asbestos contractors and individuals and links the contractor/consultant search.
Official category-based search and Export Data control reviewed; the site states its lists are informational and not endorsements.
Official asbestos-project regulation reviewed as the licensing and operating-policy evidence source.

blocker.summary: The interactive export lacks a reviewed stable data contract, completeness statement, and confirmed reuse terms; normal use remains an official manual handoff.
